⌂Dashboard◫Stack▲Deploy>Commands?Help
KCommand Palette Ctrl+K

💻 Commands Reference

All commands to operate the Hylono Stack. Click any block to copy.

💡 All commands run from the project root directory. On Windows, use Git Bash or WSL — not PowerShell.

Commands to initialise and start the stack for the first time.

Generate secrets (.env)
bash scripts/generate-secrets.sh

Safe to run — skips if .env already exists.

Start infrastructure only
bash scripts/setup.sh infrastructure
Start Phase 1A services
bash scripts/setup.sh 1a
Start Phase 1B services
bash scripts/setup.sh 1b
Start Phase 1C services
bash scripts/setup.sh 1c

5 commands in this section · 32 total
